mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_category (category_name, parent_id, sort_num, status) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{sortNum}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, parent_id, sort_num, status FROM asset_category WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_num ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, category_name, parent_id, sort_num, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM asset_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_num = #{sortNum}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE asset_category SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0
